name: Ozric
short_description: An endless forest. A magical delivery. A shortcut Ozric will never forget. Face off against waves of twisted forest creatures in fast-paced combat. Collect powerful upgrades, experiment with wild magic, and push deeper into the ever-changing forest.
detailed_description:
An endless forest. A magical delivery. A shortcut Ozric will never forget.

Step into the enchanted chaos of Ozric, a rogue-lite action adventure where every run is a challenge, and every upgrade matters. You are Ozric, a humble courier mage with a magical package and a tight deadline. When you take a shortcut through the mysterious Forest, the path begins to shift, twist, and fight back.

Face off against waves of twisted forest creatures in fast-paced combat. Collect powerful upgrades, experiment with wild magic, and push deeper into the ever-changing forest. With every defeat, you grow stronger—and so does the forest.

Key Features:

  • ⚔️ Rogue-lite action combat with fluid movement and reactive enemies

  • 🌲 Procedurally generated upgrades and skills

  • ✨ A growing arsenal of magical abilities, and upgrades

  • 🌀 Replayability with escalating difficulty and waves of new monsters

  • 📦 A whimsical tale of magic, mischief, and a very important delivery

The forest remembers every step you take. Will Ozric find his way out, or become part of the woods forever?
